name: Kripa Agarwal

about.heading: What I do
about.text: Software Engineer at LTM with a strong foundation in Computer Science and full-stack development. Skilled in React, JavaScript, Java, SQL, and Python, with solid expertise in OOP, DSA, and distributed systems. Experienced in building scalable, high-performance enterprise applications while ensuring code quality and usability. Strong collaborator with analytical problem-solving abilities and exposure to cloud, AI, and ML. Passionate about continuous learning and delivering impactful, value-driven solutions.

bullets: Developed and deployed a full‑stack application using React and ASP.NET Core with Entity Framework on Microsoft Azure.
Designed the application with a focus on scalability, maintainability, and automation of manual workflows.
Optimized database operations and backend logic to enhance overall application performance and stability.
Implemented secure REST APIs and supported reliable cloud deployment using Azure services and storage configurations.
Collaborated effectively within a team environment, demonstrating strong communication skills and contributing throughout the development lifecycle.
Developed the foundational template for the company’s website with a focus on usability and visual consistency.
Implemented core website features to enhance functionality, performance, and overall user experience.
Collaborated with team members to ensure seamless integration, responsive design, and user‑friendly navigation.
